proof: function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { T0.distance(x0, x1) <= T0.distance(x0, x2) + T0.distance(x2, x1) }[M](y, y, x)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0) { T0.distance(x0, x1) = T0.distance(x1, x0) }[M](y, x)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0) { 0 = T0.distance(x0, x0) }[M](y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not x0.is_negative or not x1.is_negative or (x0 + x1).is_negative }(x.distance(y), x.distance(y))
function(x0: Real) { not 0 <= x0 or not x0.is_negative }(x.distance(y) + x.distance(y))
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 != x1 or 0 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, y)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + -x0 <= 0 }(Real.one_half)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + -x0 = 0 }(Real.one_half)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](x, y)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not T0.lt(x0, x1) or T0.lte(x0, x1) }[Real](0, 1)
function[T0: lib(ordered_field).OrderedField] { T0.0 < T0.1 }[Real]
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 != x1 or 0 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, x)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](x, y)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](x, y)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](y, x)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 0 <= discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](y, z)

goal: discrete(x, z) <= discrete(x, y) + discrete(y, z)
proof: function[T0: lib(add_ordered_group).AddOrderedGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not T0.lte(x0, x1) or not T0.lte(x2, x3) or T0.add(x0, x2) <= T0.add(x1, x3) }[Real](0, discrete(x, y), discrete(x, z), discrete(y, z))
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 0 <= discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, y)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 != x1 or 0 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, z)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[Real](discrete(x, z))

goal: discrete(x, z) <= discrete(x, y) + discrete(y, z)
proof: function[T0: lib(add_ordered_group).AddLeftOrderedGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not T0.lte(x0, x1) or T0.add(x2, x0) <= T0.add(x2, x1) }[Real](0, discrete(y, z), 1)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](x, y)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](x, z)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + 0 = x0 }(1)
not discrete(x, z) <= discrete(x, x) + discrete(y, z)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { T0.lte(x0, x1) or T0.lte(x1, x0) }[Real](discrete(y, z), discrete(y, z))
function[T0](x0: T0) { 0 = discrete[T0](x0, x0) }[T](x)
function(x0: Real) { 0 + x0 = x0 }(discrete(y, z))

goal: forall(x0: Color, x1: Color) { discrete(x0)(x1) = 0 implies x0 = x1 }
proof: function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 0 != discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[Color](choose(k0: Color) { exists(k1: Color) { 0 = discrete(k0, k1) and not k1 = k0 } }, choose(k2: Color) { 0 = discrete(choose(k3: Color) { exists(k4: Color) { 0 = discrete(k3, k4) and not k4 = k3 } }, k2) and not choose(k5: Color) { exists(k6: Color) { 0 = discrete(k5, k6) and not k6 = k5 } } = k2 })
not 0 = discrete(choose(k0: Color) { not 0 = discrete(k0, k0) }, choose(k1: Color) { not 0 = discrete(k1, k1) })
function[T0](x0: T0) { 0 = discrete[T0](x0, x0) }[Color](choose(k0: Color) { not 0 = discrete(k0, k0) })

goal: forall(x0: Color, x1: Color) { discrete(x0)(x1) = discrete(x1)(x0) }
proof: function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { discrete[T0](x0, x1) = discrete[T0](x1, x0) }[Color](choose(k0: Color) { exists(k1: Color) { not discrete(k1, k0) = discrete(k0, k1) } }, choose(k2: Color) { not discrete(k2, choose(k3: Color) { exists(k4: Color) { not discrete(k4, k3) = discrete(k3, k4) } }) = discrete(choose(k5: Color) { exists(k6: Color) { not discrete(k6, k5) = discrete(k5, k6) } }, k2) })

goal: forall(x0: Color, x1: Color, x2: Color) { discrete(x0)(x2) <= discrete(x0)(x1) + discrete(x1)(x2) }
proof: function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { discrete[T0](x0, x1) <= discrete[T0](x0, x2) + discrete[T0](x2, x1) }[Color](choose(k0: Color) { exists(k1: Color, k2: Color) { not discrete(k0, k2) <= discrete(k0, k1) + discrete(k1, k2) } }, choose(k3: Color) { not discrete(choose(k4: Color) { exists(k5: Color, k6: Color) { not discrete(k4, k6) <= discrete(k4, k5) + discrete(k5, k6) } }, k3) <= discrete(choose(k7: Color) { exists(k8: Color, k9: Color) { not discrete(k7, k9) <= discrete(k7, k8) + discrete(k8, k9) } }, choose(k10: Color) { exists(k11: Color) { not discrete(choose(k12: Color) { exists(k13: Color, k14: Color) { not discrete(k12, k14) <= discrete(k12, k13) + discrete(k13, k14) } }, k11) <= discrete(choose(k15: Color) { exists(k16: Color, k17: Color) { not discrete(k15, k17) <= discrete(k15, k16) + discrete(k16, k17) } }, k10) + discrete(k10, k11) } }) + discrete(choose(k18: Color) { exists(k19: Color) { not discrete(choose(k20: Color) { exists(k21: Color, k22: Color) { not discrete(k20, k22) <= discrete(k20, k21) + discrete(k21, k22) } }, k19) <= discrete(choose(k23: Color) { exists(k24: Color, k25: Color) { not discrete(k23, k25) <= discrete(k23, k24) + discrete(k24, k25) } }, k18) + discrete(k18, k19) } }, k3) }, choose(k26: Color) { exists(k27: Color) { not discrete(choose(k28: Color) { exists(k29: Color, k30: Color) { not discrete(k28, k30) <= discrete(k28, k29) + discrete(k29, k30) } }, k27) <= discrete(choose(k31: Color) { exists(k32: Color, k33: Color) { not discrete(k31, k33) <= discrete(k31, k32) + discrete(k32, k33) } }, k26) + discrete(k26, k27) } })
